name: Silicone Loop Rattle Baby Toy - Cloud Island™
description:
Keep your baby happily entertained with this Loop Rattle Baby Toy from Cloud Island™. Made from silicone, this loop rattle toy is free from BPA, PVC, and phthalate, making it great for their little hands. This rattle toy features a variety of multicolor loops, making it easy to grasp, and offers hours of endless fun while enhancing their sensory experience.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
